title: NOT NULL addition without CHECK constraint shortcut — unnecessary full-table scan on PG 12+
expected_feedback: Standard: On PG 12+, SET NOT NULL performs a full-table scan while holding AccessExclusiveLock unless a CHECK constraint already proves non-null values. On 10M rows this scan could take significant time. Use the three-step pattern: ADD CHECK (status IS NOT NULL) NOT VALID → VALIDATE CONSTRAINT → SET NOT NULL (scan skipped).
